response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The latter half of the audio phonetically matches the provided 'Ai no Scenario' reference lyrics. However, the first half of the video features a custom medley/mashup of 'ZIG-ZAG', 'Tsukiakari no Michisulbe', and 'Phony' which was entirely absent from the reference JSON.
2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were used as a base for 'Ai no Scenario', while the medley/mashup section was manually transcribed and translated with 100% precision.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timings are strictly anchored to the audio vocalizations. A silent on-screen title card at 02:09 was subtitled as a visual event during an instrumental pause to ensure semantic completeness.

subtitles.original: 壊すけどいいの？
subtitles.english: I'm going to break it, is that okay?

subtitles.original: トラウマ退治の Death, Death, de, Death!
subtitles.english: Death, Death, de, Death to conquer trauma!

subtitles.original: 夢の中で君と手を繋いでいるの
subtitles.english: In my dreams, I am holding hands with you

subtitles.original: 何も知らないあの頃の二人のままで
subtitles.english: Just like we were back then, knowing nothing

subtitles.original: でも分かっているよ すぐに覚めてしまうと
subtitles.english: But I know that I will wake up soon

subtitles.original: それならばいっそ君の手でそっと 殺して
subtitles.english: If that's the case, I'd rather you gently... kill me

subtitles.original: ほら 今、今、今、今
subtitles.english: Look, now, now, now, now

subtitles.original: 委ねたい、たい、たい、たいな
subtitles.english: I want to surrender, -der, -der, -der...

subtitles.original: 奇跡とかちょっと望んじゃってもいい？
subtitles.english: Can I wish for a little bit of a miracle?

subtitles.original: いや、いや、いや、いや、いや
subtitles.english: No, no, no, no, no

subtitles.original: たちが悪いわ らい、らい、らい、らいな
subtitles.english: It's so toxic... -lai, -lai, -lai, -laina

subtitles.original: おかしなとこ全部えぐりとって
subtitles.english: Scoop out all the strange parts

subtitles.original: 拍手喝采で結構
subtitles.english: Applause is perfectly fine

subtitles.original: 好きに呼んでいいよ
subtitles.english: You can call me whatever you like

subtitles.original: トラウマにバイバイしたいの
subtitles.english: I want to say goodbye to trauma

subtitles.original: Death, Death, de, Death, Death, de, Death
subtitles.english: Death, Death, de, Death, Death, de, Death

subtitles.original: 世界欺く揺るぎない正義
subtitles.english: An unwavering justice that deceives the world

subtitles.original: ほどいて真実この手の中
subtitles.english: Unraveling the truth into these hands

subtitles.original: アイのシナリオ
subtitles.english: [Song: Ai no Scenario]

subtitles.original: 大胆不敵な影が華麗に踊る
subtitles.english: A fearless shadow dances gracefully

subtitles.original: 君が隠してる秘密いつか聞かせてよ
subtitles.english: Tell me someday the secret you're hiding

subtitles.original: 伸ばした手で触れる事は誰もできない
subtitles.english: No one can touch you with an outstretched hand

subtitles.original: 君が隠してる世界僕に見させてよ
subtitles.english: Let me see the world you're hiding

subtitles.original: 揺れる難解な心
subtitles.english: A swaying, complex heart

subtitles.original: 解き明かして奪うその瞳
subtitles.english: Those eyes that solve and steal it away

subtitles.original: 不安がって泣いてたって見つけらんないよ
subtitles.english: Even if you're anxious and crying, you won't find it

subtitles.original: 狙う真実はどこへ消えた
subtitles.english: Where has the targeted truth vanished to?

subtitles.original: たとえ世界欺く解答（こたえ）だとしても
subtitles.english: Even if it's an answer that deceives the world

subtitles.original: 「信じて」差し出す掌保存
subtitles.english: “Trust me,” I say, holding out my palm
